hypothesis: If the Segment Anything Model 2 is fine-tuned on physics-informed synthetic LPTEM videos spanning a wide range of liquid thicknesses (SNR) and used with box prompts, then on unseen LPTEM videos it will outperform a U-Net baseline in IoU/F1/J&F and generalize to real experimental data with centroid positions agreeing with manual annotations because the synthetic training distribution provides transferable particle and noise priors across imaging conditions.
